title: Construction Cost
hints: This is a Minimum Spanning Tree (MST) problem.
Use Kruskal's algorithm: sort edges by weight and add them greedily.
Use Union-Find (Disjoint Set Union) to detect cycles when adding edges.
Add edges only if they don't form a cycle (i.e., connect two different components).
Remember to apply modulo 10^9+7 to the final result.
